title: v6.7 frontier: evidence independence audit
description: Add evidence-independence-audit as a safe_read verifier that classifies evidence independence and fails when release-signoff evidence is only maker-authored or self-attested. Acceptance: low-independence fixture fails; unit tests pass; command is registered with help metadata. Stop condition: audit command + fixtures + tests only; do not integrate into release-state-audit until TASK-075. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of evidence independence, not proof of semantic truth.
triage_notes: Implemented evidence-independence-audit safe_read verifier with command registry/help metadata, CLI reference, schema, self-hosting Council review provenance, and pass/fail regression tests. Verification: evidence-independence-audit pass, targeted runtime tests pass, command-registry-refresh pass.
